title: Term Contracts: Suspension/Termination During Contract
description: Conroe ISD follows specific rules when considering whether to suspend or end an employment contract with a teacher or other staff member before the contract period is up. The policy outlines the reasons and steps the district must follow to take that kind of action, helping ensure the process is fair and consistent. Understanding these procedures helps the community know that employment decisions are handled through an established, structured process rather than arbitrarily.
